audit-trail.description: Kernel audit trail and immutable evidence emission.

boundary-policy-evaluation.description: Kernel policy boundary evaluation for product actions.

consent-enforcement.description: Kernel consent enforcement and delegation checks.

observability.description: Kernel observability, trace, metric, and log propagation.

tenant-context.description: Kernel tenant context propagation and validation.

plugin-consent.description: Consent grant, revocation, and purpose-bound access lifecycle.

plugin-human-approval.description: Human approval gates for sensitive workflows.

plugin-risk-management.description: Risk scoring and product action gating.

kernel-canonical.description: Canonical Kernel domain packs - products declare their own domain packs in manifests

policyActions.note: Product-specific policy actions are declared in product manifests with product prefix (e.g., finance:settle, digital-marketing:launch)

policyResources.note: Product-specific policy resources are declared in product manifests with product prefix (e.g., finance:transactions, phr:subject-records)
